title: Learning Skills, Learning, Skills

vocabulary.meaning: careful attention given to one thing
a plan used to achieve a goal
to study again in order to remember better
to arrange things in a clear and useful way
working well and producing good results

questions: Who has helped you learn the most and how did they do it?
What has helped you learn the most?
What do you think is the hardest to learn? Why?
What do you think is the easiest to learn? Why?
What is the best way to learn how to use computers?
How do teachers help you learn more?
How do your classmates help you learn more?
Do you thnk music can help people learn? Why or why not?
What is your favorite subject and why?
